nasb.text: Provide for yourselves three men from each tribe that I may send them, and that they may arise and walk through the land and write a description of it according to their inheritance; then they shall return to me.

esv.text: Provide three men from each tribe, and I will send them out that they may set out and go up and down the land. They shall write a description of it with a view to their inheritances, and then come to me.

cnv.text: 你們每支派要選出三個人，我要派他們去；他們要起程走遍那地，把各支派的產業描繪下來，然後回到我這裡。

ccb.text: 你们每支派要派出三个人，我要差他们去侦察，按各支派应得的土地绘制地图，然后回来禀告我。
